name: Maximize the Remaining String
input:
The first line contains one integer $t$ ($1 \le t \le 10^4$). Then $t$ test cases follow.
Each test case is characterized by a string $s$, consisting of lowercase Latin letters ($1 \le |s| \le 2 \cdot 10^5$).
It is guaranteed that the sum of the lengths of the strings in all test cases does not exceed $2 \cdot 10^5$.
output: For each test case, output the lexicographically maximum string that can be obtained after applying a certain sequence of operations after which all characters in the string become unique.

samples.input:
6
codeforces
aezakmi
abacaba
convexhull
swflldjgpaxs
myneeocktxpqjpz
samples.output:
odfrces
ezakmi
cba
convexhul
wfldjgpaxs
myneocktxqjpz
